title: Reproducible Builds, CI Gates, Artifacts, GitHub Pages, and Promotion · Failure Triage
summary: A preserved build trace contains one plausible source, path, encoding, metadata, parser, renderer, template, URL, asset, accessibility, security, cache, package, deployment, or release defect; locate the first failed boundary before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in immutable reproducible staged deployment pipeline and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debug…
objectives: Eliminate unstable order, paths, locale, time, random values, permissions, and environment leakage; use recorded source and tool identity and compare clean digests.
Pin workflow dependencies, minimize permissions, isolate untrusted changes, protect environments, retain logs safely, and separate build from deployment authority.
Build once, validate, identify, attest, retain, approve, and deploy the exact same immutable artifact instead of rebuilding.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

steps.title: Static-site publishing and Python Inspect the failure record · Debug Reproducible Build
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug publishing team handles case 9198 during an offline-first field documentation build. Build deterministic Python evidence to promote one reproducible least-authority artifact through deployment and post-release smoke checks; retain reader, content owner, revision, configuration, source, parser, route, artifact, deployment, and result identity; then publish below a project subpath and verify every internal URL, fragment, asset, feed, and canonical. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. content.code:
# Evidence: ssg-postdeploy-smoke-1mcjl4
# Competency: ssg-postdeploy-smoke.
# Case 1550: a large technical reference incremental rebuild.
# Operating constraint: test empty, malformed, deeply nested, Unicode, collision, unsafe URL, missing asset, stale cache, rejected, and recovery cases.
# Changed case: delete a source and change a shared layout, then compare incremental and clean artifact digests.
def evidence_ssg_postdeploy_smoke_1mcjl4(clean_builds: int = 2, equal_digests: bool = True, artifact_promotions: int = 1, rebuilds_after_approval: int = 0, smoke_failures: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1mcjl4 = "1mcjl4-4ljcm1-1550"
    assert evidence_variant_1mcjl4
    evidence_axes_1mcjl4 = (
        "reader1mcjl4",
        "source1550",
        "parse4ljcm1",
        "route1mcjl41550",
        "artifact15501mcjl4",
        "recovery4ljcm11550",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1mcjl4)) == 6
    if clean_builds < 2:
        return False, clean_builds, "reproducibility-sample"
    if not equal_digests:
        return False, clean_builds, "digest-drift"
    if artifact_promotions != 1 or rebuilds_after_approval > 0:
        return False, artifact_promotions, "promotion-boundary"
    if smoke_failures > 0:
        return False, smoke_failures, "postdeploy-failure"
    assert artifact_promotions == 1
    return True, clean_builds, "immutable-deployment"
